content:
We should decide how we would like to see the Manage Routes pages ordered.

Instead of the why they are ordered now, they could be

  • Routes Tab
  • Routes Properties
  • Use Routes
  • Tracks Tab
  • Tracks Properties
  • Use Tracks
  • Waypoints-Marks Tab
  • Waypoint Properties
  • Use Waypoints-Marks
  • Use Layers
  • and so on.

Any thoughts about that?
